content.text:
Now I have a clear 3D view of the molecule with all atom indices labeled. Let me examine atom 26 (N:26) carefully.

From the image, I can see:
- Atom N:26 (blue sphere, labeled "N:26") is connected to:
  - Atom C:22 (yellow/orange sphere, labeled "C:22")
  - Atom H:27 (white sphere, labeled "H:27")
  - Atom H:28 (white sphere, labeled "H:28")

The bonds are clearly visible as lines connecting these atoms. N:26 has exactly three covalent bonds, forming what appears to be an amino group (-NH₂) attached to carbon C:22.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 1590, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_1590.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 26 (N) are:
- Atom 22 (C)
- Atom 27 (H)
- Atom 28 (H)

And the geomconf_index is 1590.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 26, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
